zh.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces是Michael Hteets和Elisabet Hteets的兒子，於1184年出生在西班牙卡斯利。他和Amparo Alvarez至少有1個兒子。他去世於1225年在西班牙享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces是Michael Hteets和Elisabet Hteets的儿子，于1184年出生在西班牙卡斯利。他和Amparo Alvarez至少有1个儿子。他去世于1225年在西班牙享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

meanings: Cambodian: written ហុក, probably from Chinese 鹤 ‘crane’, the name of a bird treated as a precious and lucky animal in the past and often used in personal names in Chinese.

meanings: English: variant of Hone , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hone
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent stone, especially a boundary marker, from Middle English hone ‘stone, rock’ (Old English hān), the same word as modern English hone ‘whetstone’. Compare Honer .
German (Höne), in part of Sorbian origin: see Hoene and Hoehne .

nameMeanings.name: Antolino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of   Antonio  , now also used in parts of the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces was born in 1184, in Castile, Spain as the son of Michael Hteets and Elisabet Hteets. He had at least 1 son with Amparo Alvarez. He died in 1225, in Spain, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces est né en 1184, à Castile, Espagne, fils de Michael Hteets et Elisabet Hteets. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Amparo Alvarez. Il est décédé en 1225, à Espagne, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces wurde 1184 in Castile, Spanien, als Sohn von Michael Hteets und Elisabet Hteets geboren. Er hatte mit Amparo Alvarez mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1225 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces è nato il nel 1184 nel Castile, Spagna come figlio di Michael Hteets e Elisabet Hteets. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Amparo Alvarez. Morì nel 1225, nel Spagna, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hocesは1184年にスペインカスティルでMichael HteetsとElisabet Hteetsの息子として生まれた。彼はAmparo Alvarezとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1225年にスペインで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces(은)는 1184년 스페인 카스틸에서 Michael Hteets(와)과 Elisabet Hteets의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Amparo Alvarez(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1225년 스페인에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces nasceu em 1184, em Castile, Espanha filho de Michael Hteets e Elisabet Hteets. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Amparo Alvarez. Ele faleceu em 1225, em Espanha, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces родился в 1184 г. в местности кастиль, Испания. Его родителей звали Michael Hteets и Elisabet Hteets. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Amparo Alvarez. Он умер в 1225 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Antolino de la Hoz de Hoces nació en 1184, en Castile, España como hijo de Michael Hteets y Elisabet Hteets. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Amparo Alvarez. Murió en 1225, en España, a la edad de 41 años.
